Property.Name: Title
Property.Value: Apply Filters Button

Property.Name: WebPartDescription
Property.Value: Add this button to a page so users can decide when to apply their filter choices. Otherwise, each filter is applied when its value is changed.

Property.Name: Title
Property.Value: Indicator Details

Property.Name: WebPartDescription
Property.Value: Displays the details of a single Status Indicator. Status Indicators display an important measure for an organization and may be obtained from other data sources including SharePoint lists, Excel workbooks, and SQL Server 2005 Analysis Services KPIs.

Property.Value: Business Data
